metadata.title: Mixmoments — Event Playlist Builder | Merge MP3s Online
metadata.description: Build custom event playlists in your browser. Load MP3 files, set trim points, configure fade-out transitions between tracks, and export everything as one merged MP3. Free, no uploads, no software needed.
metadata.keywords: playlist builder, mp3 merger, event playlist, wedding playlist, party music mixer, audio editor online, merge mp3, fade transition, trim audio, browser mp3 tool
metadata.ogDescription: Build custom event playlists in your browser. Trim songs, add fade-out transitions, and export as one merged MP3. Free, no uploads required.

app.pageSubtitle: Load songs, set trim points, configure fades, export as one MP3. (Max {limit} songs)

dropZone.label: Drop your MP3 files here
dropZone.sub: or click to browse · any event, any occasion · files stay in your browser

survey.title: What are you using Mixmoments for?
survey.feedbackLabel: Anything you wish the app could do?
survey.placeholder: Your feedback shapes what we build next...
survey.thankYou: Thank you — your feedback shapes what we build next.

upgrade.title: You've hit the free limit
upgrade.subtitle: Free plan supports up to 5 songs. Unlock unlimited exports for any event — parties, weddings, festivals, corporate — with a one-time payment.
upgrade.footer: Secure payment via Stripe · No subscription · Cancel anytime isn't needed — it's yours forever
